name: It Now IFNC Index Fund
summary: It Now IFNC Index Fund is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by Banco Itaucard S.A. The fund is co-managed by Itau Unibanco S.A. It invests in public equity markets of Brazil. The fund seeks to invest in the stocks of companies operating in the financial sector including companies involved in financial intermediaries, diversified financial services and insurance, life and multi-line sectors. It invests in the stocks of companies across all market capitalizations. The fund seeks to replicate the performance of the BM&FBOVESPA Financial Index. It Now IFNC Index Fund was formed on April 1, 2011 and is domiciled in Brazil.
